style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. On the left, a board with a few small moves marked by rust warning marks labelled COURSE DE VITESSE, AUTO-APPROBATION, TOURS EN RAFALE. An arrow leads to a single enforcement token labelled THE REAPER, drawn as a simple iconographic hooded scythe motif in navy line work, not a realistic person. From it, a heavy rust arrow points to a small score bar dropping sharply, labelled POINTS RETIRÉS, PUIS RETIRÉS DE NOUVEAU. A caption reads LA TRICHE COÛTE PLUS CHER QU'ELLE NE RAPPORTE. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no realistic people. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
